CustomField.formula: IF( IP_ActivePAYEPayProfiles__c > 0, IF( Declaration_Completed__c , "", "Declaration,") & IF( PORTW_Completed__c, "", "PORTW,") & IF( TOE_Completed__c, "", "TOE,")& IF( Medical_Completed__c, "", "Medical,") & IF( New_Starter_Form__c , "", "New Starter Form ,")& IF( Equal_Opportunity_Completed__c , "", "Equal Opportunity"), "")
CustomField.label: Missing Compliance Detail PAYE
